Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the Bikir-Climat store.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price_pmr.description: The price of the product in PMR (Rubles).

old_price_pmr.description: The old price of the product in PMR (Rubles) for showing discounts.

price_md.description: The price of the product in MD (Lei).

old_price_md.description: The old price of the product in MD (Lei) for showing discounts.

images.description: An array of image URLs for the product.

specs.description: A key-value map of product specifications.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a customer.

customerName.description: The name of the customer who placed the order.

items.description: An array of items in the order, with product ID and quantity.

totalPrice.description: The total price of the order.

currency.description: The currency used for the order (PMR or MD).

status.description: The status of the order (e.g., new, done).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the order was created.

/products/{productId}.description: Stores all product information for the Bikir-Climat store.

/orders/{orderId}.description: Stores all order information placed by customers.
